subcodes.first_line: O thou who art kindled with the fire of God's remembrance! In the Arabic tongue, "Shatir" signifieth one who is skilled and adroit. Since thou art named with this title [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتعل بذکر الهی شاطر در لغت عرب بمعنی ماهر آمده پس تو که باین اسم مسمی
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action
